PYACS 0.66.20
  • pyacs.lib
  • View page source

pyacs.lib

astrotime

AstroTime: time conversions (calendar, MJD, decimal year, datetime).

coordinates

Coordinate transformation utilities.

errors

Base class for exceptions in PYACS lib core module

euclid

euclid graphics maths module

euler

Euler pole utilities: rotation vectors, velocities, and design matrices.

faultslip

Various routines relating fault parameters, slip and motion across faults

glinalg

Linear algebra for Geodesy problems.

gmtpoint

GMT psvelo-style point with position and optional velocity.

gpstime

Note: Leap seconds still needs to be checked an improve A Python implementation of GPS related time conversions.

icosahedron

Icosahedron mesh construction and subdivision.

robustestimators

Robust estimators for linear problems.

shapefile

Convert pyacs results to shapefiles.

syscmd

Runs a system commands

timeperiod

Time period representation and manipulation.

units

Various routines dealing with units conversion.

utils

Various useful routines.
